summary: CA-008 Phase 1 refactor testing completed. Successfully verified extracted components (TableRoomSelector, LoyaltyRewardsSection) from ReviewOrder.jsx. App functions identically to before with no regressions detected.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (GET /api/ returns 'Customer App API')
Homepage loads correctly with welcome message
Menu browsing works - categories and items display
Cart functionality works - items can be added
Review Order page loads and renders correctly
Order items section displays with item count badge
Price breakdown section shows Item Total, CGST, SGST, Grand Total
TableRoomSelector component conditional rendering works (CA-008 extracted)
Place Order button displays with correct total amount
No JavaScript console errors on Review Order page
